title: ROR reconciliation for institutions/funders (human-confirmed)
context: An open, source-linked map of the Ewing Sarcoma research ecosystem (organizations, grants/awards, research efforts, aggregate registered-study records, and public outputs). Institutions and funders in the NIH batch are reconciled to ROR (CC0) with human confirmation, precision over recall.
objective: Reconcile institutions/funders to ROR via an explicit blocking-key strategy with human-confirmed, reversible, provenance-preserving merges.
acceptanceCriteria: Institutions/funders matched to ROR via an explicit blocking-key strategy (precision over recall).
No automatic merge ships without human confirmation; merges reversible and provenance-preserving.
Zero confirmed false merges in the dedup audit sample; >=85% of institutions/funders carry a ROR ID.
output: data/reconciliation/ror/ reconciled institution/funder records with ROR IDs, committed via PR.
